raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The revised draft clearly identifies the load-bearing concept (model-based estimator) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The revised draft walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "The revised draft audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (validation evidence).",
    "RX.1": "The agent's uncertainty disclosure is thorough, marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no scope drift.",
    "RX.4": "The revised draft is harm-free, with no regressions or new errors.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "R1.3": 0.92,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.98,
    "RX.4": 0.99,
    "RX.5": 0.97
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The revised draft clearly identifies the load-bearing concept (model-based estimator) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The revised draft walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: The revised draft audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (validation evidence).
rationale.RX.1: The agent's uncertainty disclosure is thorough, marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: The revised draft is harm-free, with no regressions or new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
